---
title: "Oliver Reece"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: files/WebsitePhoto.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ojreece
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/oliver-reece
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:oliver.j.reece66@gmail.com
    - icon: person-fencing
      text: 🤺 Fencing
      href: https://vikings.lawrence.edu/sports/mens-fencing/roster/oliver-reece/4376
---

## Welcome!

I’m a recent Quantitative Economics graduate from Lawrence University and a former 4-year NCAA Varsity Fencer. 
I built this portfolio to showcase the intersection of my two biggest drivers: analytical rigor and disciplined execution. 
This site serves as a deep dive into my technical skill-set - featuring predictive machine learning models, financial valuations, and my professional experience.

If you are curious what's going on behind the curtain, feel free to check out my website's github repo! <br>

[Website GitHub](https://github.com/ojreece/ojreece.github.io){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
